originalTitle: Why Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Remains One of the Most Traded Stocks
summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) is among the most traded US stocks so far in 2026. On May 19, Evercore ISI lifted the price target on Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) to $579 from $358 and maintained an Outperform rating. Following Q1 AI channel checks, the firm said that key themes center on AI workloads’ […]
content:
Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMD ) is among the most traded US stocks so far in 2026 . On May 19, Evercore ISI lifted the price target on Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) to $579 from $358 and maintained an Outperform rating. Following Q1 AI channel checks, the firm said that key themes center on AI workloads’ transition from a training-led regime to an inference-led regime by the year-end. With that said, the shift emphasizes cost-per-token, ROI, and TCO, which is strengthening hyperscaler interest in homegrown ASICs and alternative accelerators.

Based on the statistics, Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) has impressive quarterly earnings growth (YoY) of 95.10% and quarterly revenue growth (YoY) of 37.80%. The company’s returns reinforce its strong position, with a one-year return surpassing the S&P 500’s return by an impressive 270.67%. AMD remains one of the most traded US stocks so far in 2026.

In another development, Citi has initiated a new CPU TAM model, projecting an annual market growth of 35% to $132 billion by 2030. Incorporating this, the firm raised the price target on Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) to $460 from $358 and reaffirmed a Neutral rating on May 18.

Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) is a California-based semiconductor company operating in three segments: Data Center, Client and Gaming, and Embedded. Founded in 1969, the company serves a diverse clientele, including original equipment and design manufacturers, system integrators, and distributors.

While we acknowledge the potential of AMD as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock .

chineseTitle: 为什么 Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) 仍然是交易量最大的股票之一
chineseSummary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：AMD）是 2026 年迄今为止交易量最大的美国股票之一。5 月 19 日，Evercore ISI 将 Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：AMD）的目标股价从 358 美元上调至 579 美元，并维持优于大盘评级。在第一季度人工智能渠道检查之后，该公司表示关键主题集中在人工智能工作负载的[...]
chineseContent:
Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：AMD）是 2026 年迄今为止交易量最大的美国股票之一。 5 月 19 日，Evercore ISI 将 Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：AMD）的目标股价从 358 美元上调至 579 美元，并维持优于大盘评级。在第一季度人工智能渠道检查之后，该公司表示，关键主题集中在年底前人工智能工作负载从训练主导的体系过渡到推理主导的体系。话虽如此，这种转变强调的是每个代币的成本、投资回报率和总体拥有成本，这增强了超大规模企业对本土 ASIC 和替代加速器的兴趣。

据统计，Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：AMD）季度盈利同比增长 95.10%，季度营收同比增长 37.80%，令人印象深刻。该公司的回报巩固了其强势地位，一年回报率超过标准普尔 500 指数回报率高达 270.67%，令人印象深刻。 AMD 仍然是 2026 年迄今为止交易量最大的美国股票之一。

另一项进展是，花旗启动了新的 CPU TAM 模型，预计到 2030 年，市场年增长率为 35%，达到 1320 亿美元。考虑到这一点，该公司将 Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：AMD）的目标股价从 358 美元上调至 460 美元，并于 5 月 18 日重申了中性评级。

Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：AMD）是一家总部位于加利福尼亚州的半导体公司，业务分为三个部分：数据中心、客户端和游戏以及嵌入式。该公司成立于 1969 年，为多元化的客户提供服务，包括原始设备和设计制造商、系统集成商和分销商。

虽然我们承认 AMD 作为一项投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票具有更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。

继续阅读：33 只股票将在 3 年内翻倍，15 只股票将在 10 年内让你致富。  

披露：无。在 Google 新闻上关注 Insider Monkey。
